---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Magni
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem or gap. e.g. *"I find it frustrating that…"*

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already tried or thought about.

## Scope / priority

- [ ] This is a small/focused change
- [ ] This requires significant refactoring
- [ ] This aligns with the project's retro DSi/3DS browsing concept
- [ ] This affects privacy or security behaviour

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
